title: Microbiology -- The 50 Most-Frequently Read Articles in Microbiology
bodyHtml:
HOME HELP FEEDBACK SUBSCRIPTIONS ARCHIVE SEARCH

The 50 Most-Frequently Read Articles
in Microbiology during July 2009 -- updated monthly

Most-read rankings are recalculated at the beginning of the month and are based on full-text and pdf views.

1.  Rainer Kalscheuer, Torsten Stölting, Alexander Steinbüchel

(In "BIOCHEMISTRY AND MOLECULAR BIOLOGY")   [Abstract]     [Full Text]     [PDF]
